# v0.3.0 Adaptive Classroom Intelligence

Tag: `v0.3.0`
Target: `main`
Milestone: `v0.3.0 Adaptive Classroom Intelligence`

## Highlights

- Activates teacher-only repeated-session intelligence for classroom generation.
- Reuses persisted session progress and latest teacher reflection to adapt new classroom outlines, scene content, scene actions, and runtime chat behavior.
- Keeps public, student, publish, generation, and game-session HTTP API shapes unchanged from `v0.2.1`.
- Preserves fail-open behavior for first-run teachers, public demo users, anonymous users, student sessions, and classroom-cookie-only flows.

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] `corepack pnpm test tests/server/classroom-intelligence.test.ts tests/server/classroom-intelligence-routes.test.ts tests/server/classroom-session-progress.test.ts tests/components/session-reflection-dialog.test.ts`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm test tests/server/chat-route.test.ts tests/server/pbl-chat-route.test.ts tests/server/generation-routes.test.ts tests/server/classroom-generation.test.ts tests/server/prompt-builder.test.ts tests/generation/media-prompt-wiring.test.ts`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run secrets:scan`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run ops:drift`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run check`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm lint`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run build`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run test:mirofish:gate`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run test:mirofish:e2e`
- [ ] `CI=1 corepack pnpm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run benchmark:milestone`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run ops:verify`

## Production Readiness

- No new production env vars are required beyond the `v0.2.1` baseline.
- Run `corepack pnpm run ops:env:vercel` before production deploy and record only key presence.
- After deploy, run `corepack pnpm run smoke:production:milestone` and `corepack pnpm run smoke:production:classroom`.
- Complete the signed-in teacher manual check: create/open a teacher classroom, complete scenes, save reflection, revisit/regenerate/chat, and confirm adaptive behavior appears only for the teacher repeat flow.

## Known Deferred Work

- Provider Composer remains queued for `v0.3.1`.
- Student-facing learning analytics and reflection capture remain deferred until the teacher-only adaptive path is stable.
- Discord scheduled-class sync remains deferred unless it becomes part of the public release surface.
